name: Interactive Slides OpenClaw Skill
description: OpenClaw skill for creating interactive, animated web presentations. Single HTML file, GSAP animations, slide/scroll modes, PPT export, style presets, brand kit integration, and accessibility compliance.
review: Professional-grade presentation tooling with 700+ line documentation. Features style presets, brand kit integration, PPT export, and accessibility compliance. Sets a high bar for content creation skills in OpenClaw.
